        lines.push("| Health | " + pipe.health + " |");
        lines.push("| Shared mount | " + (pipe.shared_mount ? "Yes" + (pipe.mount_root ? " (`" + pipe.mount_root + "`)" : "") : "No") + " |");
        lines.push("");

        // Role breakdown table — all media services grouped by role
        const svcByRole = pipe.services_by_role;
        if (svcByRole && Object.keys(svcByRole).length > 0) {
            lines.push("### Pipeline \u2014 Media Services");
            lines.push("");
            lines.push("| Service | Stack | Role | Host Mounts |");
            lines.push("|---------|-------|------|-------------|");
            for (const [role, svcs] of Object.entries(svcByRole)) {
                (svcs || []).forEach((s) => {
                    const mounts = (s.host_sources || s.volume_mounts || [])
                        .map((m) => typeof m === "string" ? "`" + m + "`" : "`" + (m.source || m) + "`")
                        .join(", ") || "(none)";
                    lines.push("| " + (s.service_name || s.name || "?") + " | " + (s.stack_name || "?") + " | " + role + " | " + mounts + " |");
                });
            }
            lines.push("");
        }

        // Roles present and missing
        if (pipe.roles_present && pipe.roles_present.length > 0) {
            lines.push("**Roles present:** " + pipe.roles_present.join(", "));
        }
        if (pipe.roles_missing && pipe.roles_missing.length > 0) {
            lines.push("**Missing roles:** " + pipe.roles_missing.join(", "));
        }
        if ((pipe.roles_present && pipe.roles_present.length > 0) ||
            (pipe.roles_missing && pipe.roles_missing.length > 0)) {
            lines.push("");
        }

        // Pipeline-level conflicts
        if (pipe.conflicts && pipe.conflicts.length > 0) {
            lines.push("### Pipeline Conflicts");
            lines.push("");
            pipe.conflicts.forEach((c) => {
                const sev = (c.severity || "unknown").toUpperCase();
                lines.push("- **" + sev + ":** " + (c.description || c.message || JSON.stringify(c)));
            });
            lines.push("");
        }
    }

    // Cross-stack sibling context from analysis data
    const crossStack = (data.cross_stack || (data.pipeline_context && data.pipeline_context.cross_stack));
    if (crossStack && crossStack.siblings && crossStack.siblings.length > 0) {
        lines.push("");
        lines.push("### Cross-Stack Siblings");
        lines.push("");
        crossStack.siblings.forEach((sib) => {
            const sibMounts = (sib.host_sources || sib.volume_mounts || [])
                .map((m) => typeof m === "string" ? "`" + m + "`" : "`" + (m.source || m) + "`")
                .join(", ") || "(none)";
            lines.push("- **" + (sib.service_name || sib.name || "?") + "** (" + (sib.stack_name || "?") + ", " + (sib.role || "?") + ") \u2014 " + sibMounts);
        });
        lines.push("");
    }

    // Pipeline role for this stack
    if (data.pipeline_role) {
        lines.push("**This stack\u2019s pipeline role:** " + data.pipeline_role);
        lines.push("");
    }

    // Services table
    const services = data.services || [];
    if (services.length > 0) {
        lines.push("");
        lines.push("### Services");
        lines.push("");
        lines.push("| Service | Role | Volumes |");
        lines.push("|---------|------|---------|");
        services.forEach((svc) => {
            const vols = (svc.volumes || [])
                .map((v) => "`" + v.source + ":" + v.target + "`")
                .join(", ") || "(none)";
            lines.push("| " + svc.name + " | " + formatRole(svc.role) + " | " + vols + " |");
        });
    }

    lines.push("");
    lines.push("---");
    lines.push("*Generated by [MapArr](https://github.com/coaxk/maparr)*");

    return lines.join("\n");
}

/**
 * Copy the diagnostic summary to clipboard. Shows a toast on success.
 */
function copyDiagnosticSummary() {
    const md = generateDiagnosticMarkdown();
    if (!md) {
        showSimpleToast("No analysis data to export", "error");
        return;
    }

    navigator.clipboard.writeText(md).then(() => {
        showSimpleToast("Diagnostic copied to clipboard", "success");
    }).catch(() => {
        // Fallback for non-HTTPS
        const textarea = document.createElement("textarea");
        textarea.value = md;
        textarea.style.cssText = "position:fixed;opacity:0";
        document.body.appendChild(textarea);
        textarea.select();
        try {
            document.execCommand("copy");
            showSimpleToast("Diagnostic copied to clipboard", "success");
        } catch {
            showSimpleToast("Copy failed \u2014 try HTTPS", "error");
        }
        document.body.removeChild(textarea);
    });
}

// ─── Footer Version & Update Check ───

/**
 * Set the footer version text from the backend health endpoint.
 */
function updateFooterVersion(version) {
    const el = document.getElementById("footer-version");
    if (el) el.textContent = "MapArr v" + version;
}

/**
 * Check GitHub releases for a newer version. Cached in sessionStorage
 * to avoid repeat API calls on page refresh. Gracefully ignores all errors
 * (404 = no releases, 403 = rate limited, network errors).
 */
async function checkForUpdates(currentVersion) {
    const CACHE_KEY = "maparr_update_check";
    const REPO = "coaxk/maparr";

    // Check sessionStorage cache first
    try {
        const cached = sessionStorage.getItem(CACHE_KEY);
        if (cached) {
            const data = JSON.parse(cached);
            if (data.checked && Date.now() - data.checked < 3600000) {
                // Cache valid for 1 hour
                if (data.latest && isNewerVersion(currentVersion, data.latest)) {
                    showUpdateBadge(data.latest);
                }
                return;
            }
        }
    } catch {}

    const controller = new AbortController();
    const timeout = setTimeout(() => controller.abort(), 15000);
    try {
        const resp = await fetch("https://api.github.com/repos/" + REPO + "/releases/latest", { signal: controller.signal });
        clearTimeout(timeout);
        if (!resp.ok) {
            // No releases, rate limited, or repo not public — cache the miss
            try { sessionStorage.setItem(CACHE_KEY, JSON.stringify({ checked: Date.now(), latest: null })); } catch {}
            return;
        }

        const data = await resp.json();
        const latestTag = (data.tag_name || "").replace(/^v/, "");

        // Cache the result
        try { sessionStorage.setItem(CACHE_KEY, JSON.stringify({ checked: Date.now(), latest: latestTag })); } catch {}

        if (latestTag && isNewerVersion(currentVersion, latestTag)) {
            showUpdateBadge(latestTag);
        }
    } catch {
        clearTimeout(timeout);
        // Network error — silently ignore
    }
}

/**
 * Compare two semver strings. Returns true if latest > current.
 */
function isNewerVersion(current, latest) {
    const c = current.split(".").map(Number);
    const l = latest.split(".").map(Number);
    for (let i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
        const cv = c[i] || 0;
        const lv = l[i] || 0;
        if (lv > cv) return true;
        if (lv < cv) return false;
    }
    return false;
}

// ─── GitHub Stars Badge ───

/**
 * Fetch the star count from GitHub API. Cached in sessionStorage (1hr TTL).
 * Called on page load from checkHealth(). Gracefully ignores all errors.
 */
async function fetchStarCount() {
    const CACHE_KEY = "maparr_star_count";
    const REPO = "coaxk/maparr";

    // Check cache first
    try {
        const cached = sessionStorage.getItem(CACHE_KEY);
        if (cached) {
            const data = JSON.parse(cached);
            if (data.checked && Date.now() - data.checked < 3600000) {
                if (data.stars !== null) showStarsBadge(data.stars);
                return;
            }
        }
    } catch {}

    const controller = new AbortController();
    const timeout = setTimeout(() => controller.abort(), 15000);
    try {
        const resp = await fetch("https://api.github.com/repos/" + REPO, { signal: controller.signal });
        clearTimeout(timeout);
        if (!resp.ok) {
            try { sessionStorage.setItem(CACHE_KEY, JSON.stringify({ checked: Date.now(), stars: null })); } catch {}
            return;
        }
        const data = await resp.json();
        const stars = data.stargazers_count || 0;
        try { sessionStorage.setItem(CACHE_KEY, JSON.stringify({ checked: Date.now(), stars })); } catch {}
        showStarsBadge(stars);
    } catch {
        clearTimeout(timeout);
        // Network error — silently ignore
    }
}

/**
 * Render a small star count badge next to the GitHub footer icon.
 */
function showStarsBadge(count) {
    const githubLink = document.querySelector('.footer-icon[data-tooltip="GitHub"]');
    if (!githubLink) return;

    // Don't duplicate
    if (githubLink.parentElement.querySelector(".github-stars")) return;

    const badge = document.createElement("a");
    badge.className = "github-stars";
    badge.href = "https://github.com/coaxk/maparr/stargazers";
    badge.target = "_blank";
    badge.rel = "noopener";
    badge.title = count + " stars on GitHub";

    const star = document.createElement("span");
    star.className = "github-stars-icon";
    star.textContent = "\u2605";
    badge.appendChild(star);

    const num = document.createElement("span");
    num.textContent = count;
    badge.appendChild(num);

    // Insert right after the GitHub icon
    githubLink.insertAdjacentElement("afterend", badge);
}

/**
 * Show the update-available state on the footer version badge.
 */
function showUpdateBadge(latestVersion) {
    const el = document.getElementById("footer-version");
    if (!el) return;
    el.classList.add("update-available");
    el.setAttribute("data-tooltip", "Update available: v" + latestVersion + " \u2014 pull latest image");
    el.addEventListener("click", () => {
        window.open("https://github.com/coaxk/maparr/releases/latest", "_blank");
    });
}


// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// LOG PANEL + TOAST SYSTEM
//
// Three-tier logging UX:
//   1. Collapsible log panel in footer — full history, filterable
//   2. Download button — exports all buffered logs as .txt
//   3. Toast notifications — WARN/ERROR pop up as dismissible toasts
//
// Discrete by default. The footer shows a tiny log icon with a badge
// count for errors. Clicking opens the full panel. Toasts auto-dismiss
// after 8 seconds but stay if hovered.
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

const _logState = {
    entries: [],
    errorCount: 0,
    panelOpen: false,
    sseSource: null,
    lastFetchTs: 0,
    panelHeight: 250,  // Default panel height in px
};

// ─── Log Panel Init ───

function initLogSystem() {
    const toggleBtn = document.getElementById("footer-log-toggle");
    const closeBtn = document.getElementById("log-close-btn");
    const downloadBtn = document.getElementById("log-download-btn");
    const clearBtn = document.getElementById("log-clear-btn");
    const levelFilter = document.getElementById("log-level-filter");

    if (toggleBtn) toggleBtn.addEventListener("click", toggleLogPanel);
    if (closeBtn) closeBtn.addEventListener("click", () => closeLogPanel());
    if (downloadBtn) downloadBtn.addEventListener("click", downloadLogs);
    if (clearBtn) clearBtn.addEventListener("click", clearLogPanel);
    if (levelFilter) levelFilter.addEventListener("change", () => renderLogEntries());

    // Set up drag-to-resize handle
    initLogPanelResize();

    // Fetch initial logs
    fetchLogs();

    // Connect SSE for live updates
    connectLogStream();
}

// (initLogSystem is now called immediately in the main DOMContentLoaded handler
// so SSE connects during boot and logs flow from the start.)

// Clean up SSE connection on page unload to prevent server-side connection leak.
// Without this, navigating away or closing the tab leaves the EventSource open
// and the backend keeps the SSE generator alive until it times out.
window.addEventListener("beforeunload", () => {
    if (_logState.sseSource) {
        _logState.sseSource.close();
        _logState.sseSource = null;
    }
});

// ─── Log Panel Toggle ───

function toggleLogPanel() {
    if (_logState.panelOpen) {
        closeLogPanel();
    } else {
        openLogPanel();
    }
}

function openLogPanel() {
    const panel = document.getElementById("log-panel");
    if (!panel) return;
    panel.classList.remove("hidden");
    panel.style.height = _logState.panelHeight + "px";
    _logState.panelOpen = true;

    // Flip close arrow to point down (panel is open, click to close/collapse)
    const closeBtn = document.getElementById("log-close-btn");
    if (closeBtn) closeBtn.classList.add("log-btn-flip");

    // Clear any analysis-triggered pulse
    const toggle = document.getElementById("footer-log-toggle");
    if (toggle) toggle.classList.remove("log-toggle-pulse");

    // Clear error badge when panel is opened
    _logState.errorCount = 0;
    updateLogBadge();

    // Add bottom padding to page so content isn't hidden behind panel
    _updatePagePadding();

    // Scroll log entries to bottom
    const entries = document.getElementById("log-entries");
    if (entries) entries.scrollTop = entries.scrollHeight;
}

function closeLogPanel() {
    const panel = document.getElementById("log-panel");
    if (panel) panel.classList.add("hidden");
    _logState.panelOpen = false;

    // Flip close arrow back to up
    const closeBtn = document.getElementById("log-close-btn");
    if (closeBtn) closeBtn.classList.remove("log-btn-flip");

    // Remove bottom padding
    _updatePagePadding();
}

function _updatePagePadding() {
    // Add/remove padding at the bottom of the page so the log panel
    // doesn't cover content. Users can always scroll to see buttons.
    const body = document.body;
    if (_logState.panelOpen) {
        body.style.paddingBottom = (_logState.panelHeight + 20) + "px";
    } else {
        body.style.paddingBottom = "";
    }
}

// ─── Drag-to-Resize ───

function initLogPanelResize() {
    const panel = document.getElementById("log-panel");
    if (!panel) return;

    // Create the resize handle (thin bar at the top of the panel)
    const handle = document.createElement("div");
    handle.className = "log-resize-handle";
    handle.title = "Drag to resize";
    panel.insertBefore(handle, panel.firstChild);

    let startY = 0;
    let startHeight = 0;

    function onMouseDown(e) {
        e.preventDefault();
        startY = e.clientY || (e.touches && e.touches[0].clientY) || 0;
        startHeight = panel.offsetHeight;
        document.addEventListener("mousemove", onMouseMove);
        document.addEventListener("mouseup", onMouseUp);
        document.addEventListener("touchmove", onMouseMove, { passive: false });
        document.addEventListener("touchend", onMouseUp);
        document.body.style.userSelect = "none";
        handle.classList.add("dragging");
    }

    function onMouseMove(e) {
        e.preventDefault();
        const clientY = e.clientY || (e.touches && e.touches[0].clientY) || 0;
        const delta = startY - clientY; // Dragging up = positive delta = taller
        const newHeight = Math.min(Math.max(startHeight + delta, 120), window.innerHeight * 0.7);
        _logState.panelHeight = newHeight;
        panel.style.height = newHeight + "px";
        _updatePagePadding();
    }

    function onMouseUp() {
        document.removeEventListener("mousemove", onMouseMove);
        document.removeEventListener("mouseup", onMouseUp);
        document.removeEventListener("touchmove", onMouseMove);
        document.removeEventListener("touchend", onMouseUp);
        document.body.style.userSelect = "";
        handle.classList.remove("dragging");
    }

    handle.addEventListener("mousedown", onMouseDown);
    handle.addEventListener("touchstart", onMouseDown, { passive: false });
}

// ─── Fetch Logs from API ───

async function fetchLogs() {
    const controller = new AbortController();
    const timeout = setTimeout(() => controller.abort(), 10000);
    try {
        const resp = await fetch("/api/logs?limit=200", { signal: controller.signal });
        clearTimeout(timeout);
        if (!resp.ok) return;
        const data = await resp.json();
        _logState.entries = (data.entries || []).reverse(); // API returns newest first, we want oldest first
        if (_logState.entries.length > 0) {
            _logState.lastFetchTs = _logState.entries[_logState.entries.length - 1].ts;
        }
        renderLogEntries();
    } catch {
        clearTimeout(timeout);
        // Backend not ready yet — will get entries via SSE
    }
}

// ─── SSE Live Stream ───

// Exponential backoff for SSE reconnection: 5s → 10s → 20s → 40s → 60s cap.
// Resets to 5s on successful connection. Prevents hammering a down backend.
let _sseReconnectDelay = 5000;
const _SSE_MAX_DELAY = 60000;

function connectLogStream() {
    if (_logState.sseSource) {
        _logState.sseSource.close();
    }

    try {
        const es = new EventSource("/api/logs/stream");
        _logState.sseSource = es;

        es.addEventListener("connected", () => {
            // Connected successfully — reset backoff
            _sseReconnectDelay = 5000;
            // Backfill any entries we missed during the disconnection gap.
            _backfillMissedLogs();
        });

        es.addEventListener("log", (event) => {
            try {
                const entry = JSON.parse(event.data);
                addLogEntry(entry);
            } catch {}
        });

        es.addEventListener("error", () => {
            es.close();
            _logState.sseSource = null;
            // Exponential backoff with cap
            setTimeout(connectLogStream, _sseReconnectDelay);
            _sseReconnectDelay = Math.min(_sseReconnectDelay * 2, _SSE_MAX_DELAY);
        });
    } catch {
        // SSE not supported — fall back to polling (once only)
        if (!_logState._pollingFallback) {
            _logState._pollingFallback = true;
            setInterval(fetchLogs, 10000);
        }
    }
}

/**
 * Backfill log entries missed during SSE disconnection.
 *
 * When the SSE stream drops (tab throttled, network hiccup, backend restart),
 * entries generated during the gap are lost. This fetches the server's log
 * buffer and merges any entries newer than our last known timestamp.
 * Deduplicates by timestamp+message to avoid showing the same entry twice.
 */
async function _backfillMissedLogs() {
    const controller = new AbortController();
    const timeout = setTimeout(() => controller.abort(), 10000);
    try {
        const resp = await fetch("/api/logs?limit=200", { signal: controller.signal });
        clearTimeout(timeout);
        if (!resp.ok) return;
        const data = await resp.json();
        const serverEntries = (data.entries || []).reverse(); // oldest first

        if (serverEntries.length === 0) return;

        // Find our latest timestamp
        const lastTs = _logState.entries.length > 0
            ? _logState.entries[_logState.entries.length - 1].ts
            : 0;

        // Build a quick dedup key from existing entries (last 50 for perf)
        const existing = new Set();
        const recentEntries = _logState.entries.slice(-50);
        recentEntries.forEach((e) => {
            existing.add(e.ts + "|" + (e.message || "").substring(0, 60));
        });

        // Merge entries newer than our last known timestamp
        let added = 0;
        serverEntries.forEach((entry) => {
            if (entry.ts <= lastTs) return;
            const key = entry.ts + "|" + (entry.message || "").substring(0, 60);
            if (existing.has(key)) return;
            existing.add(key);
            addLogEntry(entry);
            added++;
        });

        if (added > 0) {
            console.log("Log backfill: recovered " + added + " missed entries");
        }
    } catch {
        clearTimeout(timeout);
        // Backfill is best-effort — don't break the stream
    }
}

// ─── Add Log Entry ───

function addLogEntry(entry) {
    _logState.entries.push(entry);
    // Cap at 500 entries in memory
    if (_logState.entries.length > 500) {
        _logState.entries.shift();
    }

    // Live progress: update terminal title during analysis with step info.
    // Backend logs "Step X/6: ..." — we surface this as inline progress so
    // users see activity even without opening the log panel.
    if (state._analysisInFlight && entry.message) {
        const stepMatch = entry.message.match(/^Step (\d+)\/(\d+):\s*(.+)/);
        if (stepMatch) {
            const termTitle = document.querySelector(".terminal-title");
            if (termTitle) {
                termTitle.textContent = "Step " + stepMatch[1] + "/" + stepMatch[2] + ": " + stepMatch[3];
            }
        }
    }

    // Render if panel is open
    if (_logState.panelOpen) {
        appendLogEntryToDOM(entry);
    }

    // Badge + toast for significant log entries.
    // Only ERROR/CRITICAL increment the badge — WARNINGs are expected during
    // pipeline scans (mount conflicts are informational, not failures) and
    // would flood the badge with false urgency on every boot.
    if (entry.level === "ERROR" || entry.level === "CRITICAL") {
        if (!_logState.panelOpen) {
            _logState.errorCount++;
            updateLogBadge();
        }
        showToast(entry);
    }
}

// ─── Render Log Entries ───

function renderLogEntries() {
    const container = document.getElementById("log-entries");
    if (!container) return;
    container.replaceChildren();

    const levelFilter = document.getElementById("log-level-filter");
    const minLevel = levelFilter ? levelFilter.value : "";
    const levelOrder = { DEBUG: 0, INFO: 1, WARNING: 2, ERROR: 3, CRITICAL: 4 };
    const minLevelNum = minLevel ? (levelOrder[minLevel] || 0) : 0;

    _logState.entries.forEach((entry) => {
        const entryLevel = levelOrder[entry.level] || 0;
        if (entryLevel >= minLevelNum) {
            appendLogEntryToDOM(entry);
        }
    });

    // Auto-scroll to bottom
    container.scrollTop = container.scrollHeight;
}

function appendLogEntryToDOM(entry) {
    const container = document.getElementById("log-entries");
    if (!container) return;

    const levelFilter = document.getElementById("log-level-filter");
    const minLevel = levelFilter ? levelFilter.value : "";
    const levelOrder = { DEBUG: 0, INFO: 1, WARNING: 2, ERROR: 3, CRITICAL: 4 };
    if (minLevel && (levelOrder[entry.level] || 0) < (levelOrder[minLevel] || 0)) {
        return; // Filtered out
    }

    const row = document.createElement("div");
    row.className = "log-entry log-entry-" + entry.level;

    const ts = document.createElement("span");
    ts.className = "log-ts";
    const date = new Date(entry.ts * 1000);
    ts.textContent = date.toLocaleTimeString();
    row.appendChild(ts);

    const level = document.createElement("span");
    level.className = "log-level log-level-" + entry.level;
    level.textContent = entry.level.substring(0, 4);
    row.appendChild(level);

    const source = document.createElement("span");
    source.className = "log-source";
    source.textContent = entry.logger ? entry.logger.replace("maparr.", "") : "";
    row.appendChild(source);

    const msg = document.createElement("span");
    msg.className = "log-msg";
    msg.textContent = entry.message;
    msg.title = entry.message; // Full text on hover
    row.appendChild(msg);

    container.appendChild(row);

    // Auto-scroll if near bottom
    const isNearBottom = container.scrollHeight - container.scrollTop - container.clientHeight < 60;
    if (isNearBottom) {
        container.scrollTop = container.scrollHeight;
    }
}

// ─── Log Badge ───

function updateLogBadge() {
    const badge = document.getElementById("log-badge");
    if (!badge) return;
    if (_logState.errorCount > 0) {
        badge.textContent = _logState.errorCount > 99 ? "99+" : _logState.errorCount;
        badge.classList.remove("hidden");
    } else {
        badge.classList.add("hidden");
    }
}

// ─── Download Logs ───

function downloadLogs() {
    const lines = _logState.entries.map((e) => {
        const date = new Date(e.ts * 1000);
        const ts = date.toISOString();
        return ts + " [" + e.level + "] " + (e.logger || "") + ": " + e.message;
    });

    const text = "MapArr Application Logs\n"
        + "Generated: " + new Date().toISOString() + "\n"
        + "Entries: " + lines.length + "\n"
        + "─".repeat(60) + "\n\n"
        + lines.join("\n");

    const blob = new Blob([text], { type: "text/plain" });
    const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
    const a = document.createElement("a");
    a.href = url;
    a.download = "maparr-logs-" + new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10) + ".txt";
    a.click();
    URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
}

// ─── Clear Log Panel ───

function clearLogPanel() {
    _logState.entries = [];
    _logState.errorCount = 0;
    updateLogBadge();
    const container = document.getElementById("log-entries");
    if (container) container.replaceChildren();
}

// ─── Toast Notifications ───

function showToast(entry) {
    const container = document.getElementById("toast-container");
    if (!container) return;

    const toast = document.createElement("div");
    toast.className = "toast toast-" + (entry.level === "ERROR" || entry.level === "CRITICAL" ? "error" : "warning");

    const icon = document.createElement("span");
    icon.className = "toast-icon";
    icon.textContent = entry.level === "ERROR" || entry.level === "CRITICAL" ? "\u274C" : "\u26A0\uFE0F";
    toast.appendChild(icon);

    const body = document.createElement("div");
    body.className = "toast-body";
    const msg = document.createElement("div");
    msg.className = "toast-message";
    // Truncate long messages
    const text = entry.message.length > 120 ? entry.message.substring(0, 117) + "..." : entry.message;
    msg.textContent = text;
    body.appendChild(msg);
    const meta = document.createElement("div");
    meta.className = "toast-meta";
    meta.textContent = (entry.logger || "").replace("maparr.", "") + " \u2022 " + new Date(entry.ts * 1000).toLocaleTimeString();
    body.appendChild(meta);
    toast.appendChild(body);

    const actions = document.createElement("div");
    actions.className = "toast-actions";

    const copyBtn = document.createElement("button");
    copyBtn.className = "toast-btn";
    copyBtn.textContent = "Copy";
    copyBtn.setAttribute("aria-label", "Copy log entry to clipboard");
    copyBtn.addEventListener("click", (e) => {
        e.stopPropagation();
        navigator.clipboard.writeText(entry.message).then(() => {
            copyBtn.textContent = "Copied";
            setTimeout(() => { copyBtn.textContent = "Copy"; }, 1500);
        });
    });
    actions.appendChild(copyBtn);
    toast.appendChild(actions);

    // Click toast body → open log panel
    toast.addEventListener("click", () => {
        dismissToast(toast);
        openLogPanel();
    });

    container.appendChild(toast);

    // Auto-dismiss after 8 seconds
    const timer = setTimeout(() => dismissToast(toast), 8000);

    // Pause on hover
    toast.addEventListener("mouseenter", () => clearTimeout(timer));
    toast.addEventListener("mouseleave", () => {
        setTimeout(() => dismissToast(toast), 3000);
    });
}

function dismissToast(toast) {
    if (!toast.parentNode) return;
    toast.classList.add("toast-dismiss");
    setTimeout(() => {
        if (toast.parentNode) toast.parentNode.removeChild(toast);
    }, 200);
}
```

#### frontend/styles.css (5126 lines)
```css
/*
 * MapArr v1.3 — Styles
 *
 * Dark theme inspired by Beszel/Termix aesthetic.
 * High contrast, colorblind-friendly palette.
 * No build tools — plain CSS.
 */

/* ─── Reset & Base ─── */

*,
*::before,
*::after {
    box-sizing: border-box;
    margin: 0;
    padding: 0;
}

:root {
    --bg-body: #0f1117;
    --bg-card: #181b23;
    --bg-card-hover: #1e2230;
    --bg-input: #12141c;
    --bg-selected: #1a2a3a;

    --border: #2a2e3a;
    --border-focus: #4a90d9;
    --border-selected: #4a90d9;

    --text-primary: #e4e6eb;
    --text-secondary: #9ba1b0;
    --text-muted: #8b949e; /* [2026-03-10 12:35] QW-2: Raised from #5c6370 for WCAG AA contrast (5.2:1 on dark bg) */

    --accent: #4a90d9;
    --accent-hover: #5ca0e9;
    --success: #3fb950;
    --warning: #d29922;
    --error: #f85149;

    --font-sans: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto,
        Oxygen, Ubuntu, sans-serif;
    --font-mono: "SF Mono", "Cascadia Code", "Fira Code", "JetBrains Mono",
        Consolas, monospace;

    --radius: 8px;
    --radius-sm: 4px;
    --shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3);

    /* [2026-03-10 13:20] DS-2: Icon sizing scale */
    --icon-sm: 14px;
    --icon-md: 18px;
    --icon-lg: 24px;

    /* Spacing scale: --space-1: 0.25rem | --space-2: 0.5rem | --space-3: 0.75rem |
       --space-4: 1rem | --space-6: 1.5rem | --space-8: 2rem [DS-3 documentation] */
}

/* [2026-03-10 12:55] A11Y-4: Screen-reader-only utility for form labels */
.sr-only {
    position: absolute;
    width: 1px;
    height: 1px;
    padding: 0;
    overflow: hidden;
    clip: rect(0, 0, 0, 0);
    white-space: nowrap;
    border: 0;
}

html {
    font-size: 15px;
    -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
}

body {
    font-family: var(--font-sans);
    background: var(--bg-body);
    color: var(--text-primary);
    line-height: 1.6;
    min-height: 100vh;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
}

/* ─── Header ─── */

.header {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: space-between;
    padding: 1rem 2rem;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
    background: var(--bg-card);
    position: sticky;
    top: 0;
    z-index: 50;
}

.header-brand {
    display: flex;
    align-items: baseline;
    gap: 0.75rem;
    text-decoration: none;
    color: inherit;
    cursor: pointer;
}

.logo {
    font-size: 1.4rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: var(--accent);
    letter-spacing: -0.5px;
}

.tagline {
    font-size: 0.85rem;
    color: var(--text-muted);
}

.header-status {
    font-size: 0.8rem;
    color: var(--text-muted);
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: flex-end;
    gap: 0.15rem;
}

.header-status.connected {
    color: var(--text-secondary);
}

.header-status.disconnected {
    color: var(--error);
}

.header-status-line {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 0.4rem;
}

.header-status-dot {
    width: 8px;
    height: 8px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    flex-shrink: 0;
}

.header-status-dot.online {
    background: var(--success);
    box-shadow: 0 0 6px rgba(63, 185, 80, 0.5);
}

.header-status-dot.offline {
    background: var(--error);
    box-shadow: 0 0 6px rgba(248, 81, 73, 0.5);
}

.header-count-badge {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    padding: 0.1rem 0.45rem;
    border-radius: 10px;
    font-size: 0.7rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    background: rgba(63, 185, 80, 0.12);
    color: var(--success);
    border: 1px solid rgba(63, 185, 80, 0.25);
}

.header-scan-path {
    font-size: 0.7rem;
    color: var(--text-muted);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    max-width: 300px;
    overflow: hidden;
    text-overflow: ellipsis;
    white-space: nowrap;
}

.header-scan-path:hover {
    color: var(--accent);
    text-decoration: underline;
}

.header-path-chevron {
    font-size: 0.6rem;
    margin-left: 0.25rem;
    opacity: 0.5;
    transition: opacity 0.15s;
}

.header-scan-path:hover .header-path-chevron {
    opacity: 1;
}

/* One-shot nudge glow — draws attention to the header scan path.
   Slow 2.5s fade gives peripheral vision time to catch it. */
.header-nudge .header-scan-path {
    animation: headerNudgeGlow 2.5s ease-in-out;
}
.header-nudge .header-count-badge {
    animation: headerNudgeGlow 2.5s ease-in-out 0.15s;
}
@keyframes headerNudgeGlow {
    0%   { color: var(--accent); text-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(88, 166, 255, 0.7); }
    40%  { color: var(--accent); text-shadow: 0 0 6px rgba(88, 166, 255, 0.4); }
    100% { color: inherit; text-shadow: none; }
}

/* Hint pointing users to the header scanner */
.boot-hint-nudge {
    margin-top: 0.75rem;
    opacity: 0.55;
    font-style: italic;
}

/* ─── Header Path Dropdown ─── */

.header-path-dropdown {
    position: absolute;
    top: 100%;
    right: 0;
    z-index: 100;
    background: var(--bg-card);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: var(--radius);
    padding: 0.75rem;
    min-width: 320px;
    max-width: min(500px, 90vw);
    box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4);
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 0.5rem;
}

.dropdown-label {
    font-size: 0.72rem;
    color: var(--text-muted);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 0.5px;
    margin-top: 0.25rem;
}

.dropdown-dir-btn {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: center;
    width: 100%;
    min-width: 0;
    overflow: hidden;
    padding: 0.5rem 0.6rem;
    background: var(--bg-input);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: background 0.15s, border-color 0.15s;
    text-align: left;
    color: var(--text-primary);
}

.dropdown-dir-btn:hover {
    background: var(--bg-card-hover);
    border-color: var(--border-focus);
}

.dropdown-dir-path {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: 0.8rem;
    overflow: hidden;
    text-overflow: ellipsis;
    white-space: nowrap;
    min-width: 0;
}

.dropdown-dir-meta {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 0.5rem;
    flex-shrink: 0;
    margin-left: 0.75rem;
}

.dropdown-dir-count {
    font-size: 0.72rem;
    color: var(--text-muted);
}

.dropdown-dir-current {
    font-size: 0.68rem;
    color: var(--success);
    font-weight: 600;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 0.3px;
}

.dropdown-dir-active {
    border-color: var(--success);
}

.dropdown-dir-row {
    display: flex;
    gap: 0.3rem;
    align-items: stretch;
}

.dropdown-dir-row .dropdown-dir-btn {
    flex: 1;
}

.dropdown-dir-remove {
    background: var(--bg-input);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
    color: var(--text-muted);
    cursor: pointer;
    padding: 0 0.5rem;
    font-size: 1rem;
    transition: color 0.15s, border-color 0.15s;
}

.dropdown-dir-remove:hover {
    color: var(--error);
    border-color: var(--error);
}

.dropdown-manual-row {
    display: flex;
    gap: 0.4rem;
    align-items: center;
}

.dropdown-path-input {
    font-size: 0.8rem;
}

/* ─── Main ─── */

.main {
    flex: 1;
    max-width: 800px;
    width: 100%;
    margin: 0 auto;
    padding: 2rem 1.5rem;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 1.5rem;
}

/* ─── Cards ─── */

.card {
    background: var(--bg-card);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: var(--radius);
    padding: 1.5rem;
    box-shadow: var(--shadow);
}

.hidden {
    display: none !important;
}

/* Mode-based visibility — CSS safety net that prevents cross-mode leaking */
body[data-mode="fix"] #step-stacks { display: none !important; }
body[data-mode="browse"] #step-error,
body[data-mode="browse"] #step-parse-result,
body[data-mode="browse"] #step-fix-match { display: none !important; }

/* ─── Fix Mode: Compact Pill Picker ─── */

.fix-match-pills {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(13rem, 1fr));
    gap: 0.45rem;
    margin-top: 0.15rem;
}

.fix-match-pill {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 0.35rem;
    padding: 0.4rem 0.75rem;
    background: var(--bg-input);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: 20px;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: border-color 0.15s, background 0.15s;
    color: var(--text-primary);
    font-size: 0.82rem;
    white-space: nowrap;
    overflow: hidden;
    line-height: 1.2;
}


.fix-match-pill:hover {
    border-color: var(--accent);
    background: var(--bg-card-hover);
}

.fix-match-pill .health-dot {
    width: 8px !important;
    height: 8px !important;
    min-width: 8px;
    min-height: 8px;
    margin: 0 !important;
    flex-shrink: 0;
    box-shadow: none;
    align-self: center;
}

.fix-pill-name {
    font-weight: 600;
    line-height: 1;
    overflow: hidden;
    text-overflow: ellipsis;
}

.fix-pill-count {
    font-size: 0.7rem;
    color: var(--text-muted);
    line-height: 1;
}

.fix-match-hint {
    font-size: 0.78rem;
    color: var(--text-muted);
    margin-top: 0.75rem;
    margin-bottom: 0;
}

/* Tighten the step-desc → pills gap in fix-match section */
#step-fix-match .step-desc {
    margin-bottom: 0.6rem;
}

.fix-wrong-stack {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    gap: 0.4rem;
    margin-top: 0.5rem;
    font-size: 0.82rem;
    color: var(--text-muted);
}

/* ─── Step Header ─── */

.step-header {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 0.75rem;
    margin-bottom: 0.75rem;
}

.step-number {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    width: 28px;
    height: 28px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    background: var(--accent);
    color: #fff;
    font-size: 0.85rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    flex-shrink: 0;
}

.step-number.ok {
    background: var(--success);
}

.step-header h2 {
    font-size: 1.1rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: var(--text-primary);
}

.step-desc {
    color: var(--text-secondary);
    font-size: 0.9rem;
    margin-bottom: 1rem;
}

/* ─── Boot Screen ─── */

#boot-screen .terminal-body {
    min-height: 60px;
    max-height: 180px;
}

.boot-context-line {
    font-size: 0.82rem;
    color: var(--text-muted);
    margin-top: 0.2rem;
    font-weight: 400;
}

.boot-path-row {
    display: flex;
    gap: 0.5rem;
    align-items: center;
    margin-top: 0.75rem;
}

.boot-hint {
    margin-top: 0.75rem;
    color: var(--text-muted);
    font-size: 0.82rem;
}

/* Boot → Mode crossfade transitions */
#boot-screen.boot-done {
    animation: bootFadeOut 0.3s ease-in forwards;
}

.boot-reveal {
    animation: bootFadeIn 0.3s ease-out forwards;
}

@keyframes bootFadeOut {
    from { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
    to   { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(-10px); }
}

@keyframes bootFadeIn {
    from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(10px); }
    to   { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
}

/* ─── Mode Selector ─── */

.mode-selector {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 1rem;
    margin-top: 0.5rem;
}

.mode-btn {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 0.5rem;
    padding: 1.5rem 1rem;
    background: var(--bg-input);
    border: 2px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: var(--radius);
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: border-color 0.2s, background 0.2s, transform 0.1s;
    text-align: center;
    color: var(--text-primary);
}

.mode-btn:hover {
    border-color: var(--accent);
    background: var(--bg-card-hover);
    transform: translateY(-1px);
}

.mode-btn:active {
    transform: translateY(0);
}

.mode-icon {
    font-size: 1.8rem;
    line-height: 1;
}

.mode-title {
    font-size: 1rem;
    font-weight: 600;
}

.mode-desc {
    font-size: 0.82rem;
    color: var(--text-muted);
    line-height: 1.4;
}

@media (max-width: 600px) {
    .mode-selector {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    }
}

/* ─── Error Textarea ─── */

.error-textarea {
    width: 100%;
    background: var(--bg-input);
    color: var(--text-primary);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
    padding: 0.75rem 1rem;
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: 0.85rem;
    line-height: 1.5;
    resize: vertical;
    transition: border-color 0.15s;
}

.error-textarea:focus {
    outline: none;
    border-color: var(--border-focus);
}

.error-textarea::placeholder {
    color: var(--text-muted);
}

/* ─── Live Error Preview ─── */

.error-live-preview {
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 0.4rem;
    margin-top: 0.5rem;
    min-height: 0;
    transition: min-height 0.2s;
}

.error-live-preview:empty {
    display: none;
}

.preview-pill {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 0.3rem;
    padding: 0.25rem 0.55rem;
    border-radius: 12px;
    font-size: 0.75rem;
    font-weight: 500;
    line-height: 1;
    height: 1.65rem;
    box-sizing: border-box;
    vertical-align: middle;
    background: rgba(74, 144, 217, 0.08);
    border: 1px solid rgba(74, 144, 217, 0.15);
    color: var(--text-secondary);
    animation: pillFade 0.2s ease-out;
}

.preview-pill-icon {
    font-size: 0.7rem;
    line-height: 1;
    opacity: 0.7;
    flex-shrink: 0;
    width: 0.85rem;
    text-align: center;
}

.preview-pill.pill-service {
    background: rgba(63, 185, 80, 0.08);
    border-color: rgba(63, 185, 80, 0.2);
    color: var(--success);
}

.preview-pill.pill-path {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: 0.7rem;
    max-width: 22rem;
    overflow: hidden;
    text-overflow: ellipsis;
    white-space: nowrap;
}

.preview-pill.pill-error {
    background: rgba(248, 81, 73, 0.08);
    border-color: rgba(248, 81, 73, 0.15);
    color: var(--error);
}

@keyframes pillFade {
    from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(4px); }
    to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
}

/* ─── Input Helpers ─── */

/* ─── Example Error Pills ─── */

.example-errors {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: 0.4rem;
    margin-top: 0.6rem;
}

.example-label {
    font-size: 0.78rem;
    color: var(--text-muted);
    margin-right: 0.2rem;
}

.example-pill {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    padding: 0.25rem 0.65rem;
    background: transparent;
    color: var(--text-muted);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: 14px;
    font-size: 0.75rem;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: color 0.15s, border-color 0.15s, background 0.15s;
    font-family: var(--font-sans);
}

.example-pill:hover {
    color: var(--accent);
    border-color: var(--accent);
    background: rgba(74, 144, 217, 0.06);
}

.input-examples {
    font-size: 0.8rem;
    color: var(--text-muted);
    margin-top: 0.5rem;
    font-style: italic;
}

.skip-hint {
    font-size: 0.78rem;
    color: var(--text-muted);
    margin-top: 0.25rem;
    width: 100%;
}

/* ─── Buttons ─── */

.step-actions {
    display: flex;
    gap: 0.75rem;
    margin-top: 1rem;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
}

.btn {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    padding: 0.55rem 1.25rem;
    border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
    font-size: 0.9rem;
    font-weight: 500;
    cursor: pointer;
    border: none;
    transition: background 0.15s, opacity 0.15s;
}

.btn:disabled {
    opacity: 0.5;
    cursor: not-allowed;
}

/* [2026-03-10 12:35] QW-2: Darkened btn-primary bg from --accent (#4a90d9) to #3570b5 for 4.6:1 contrast with white text */
.btn-primary {
    background: #3570b5;
    color: #fff;
}

.btn-primary:hover:not(:disabled) {
    background: var(--accent); /* Hover lifts to original accent blue */
}

.btn-ghost {
    background: transparent;
    color: var(--text-secondary);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
}

.btn-ghost:hover:not(:disabled) {
    background: var(--bg-card-hover);
    color: var(--text-primary);
}

.btn-subtle {
    background: rgba(74, 144, 217, 0.08);
    color: var(--text-secondary);
    border: 1px solid rgba(74, 144, 217, 0.15);
    gap: 0.35rem;
}

.btn-subtle:hover:not(:disabled) {
    background: rgba(74, 144, 217, 0.14);
    color: var(--text-primary);
    border-color: rgba(74, 144, 217, 0.3);
}

.btn-icon {
    font-size: 0.85em;
    line-height: 1;
    opacity: 0.7;
}

/* ─── Parse Result ─── */

.parse-details {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 0.5rem;
}

.parse-field {
    display: flex;
    align-items: baseline;
    gap: 0.5rem;
}

.parse-label {
    font-size: 0.8rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: var(--text-muted);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 0.5px;
    min-width: 90px;
}

.parse-value {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: 0.9rem;
    color: var(--text-primary);
}

.parse-value.none {
    color: var(--text-muted);
    font-style: italic;
    font-family: var(--font-sans);
}

.confidence-badge {
    display: inline-block;
    padding: 0.15rem 0.6rem;
    border-radius: 12px;
    font-size: 0.75rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 0.5px;
}

.confidence-high {
    background: rgba(63, 185, 80, 0.15);
    color: var(--success);
    border: 1px solid rgba(63, 185, 80, 0.3);
}

.confidence-medium {
    background: rgba(210, 153, 34, 0.15);
    color: var(--warning);
    border: 1px solid rgba(210, 153, 34, 0.3);
}

.confidence-low {
    background: rgba(248, 81, 73, 0.12);
    color: var(--warning);
    border: 1px solid rgba(210, 153, 34, 0.2);
}

.confidence-none {
    background: rgba(92, 99, 112, 0.15);
    color: var(--text-muted);
    border: 1px solid rgba(92, 99, 112, 0.3);
}

.parse-suggestions {
    margin-top: 0.5rem;
    padding: 0.75rem 1rem;
    background: rgba(74, 144, 217, 0.08);
    border: 1px solid rgba(74, 144, 217, 0.15);
    border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
    font-size: 0.88rem;
    color: var(--text-secondary);
}

/* ─── Multi-Error Picker ─── */

.multi-error-header {
    color: var(--text-secondary);
    font-size: 0.9rem;
    margin-bottom: 0.75rem;
    line-height: 1.5;
}

.multi-error-list {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 0.5rem;
}

.multi-error-item {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 0.75rem;
    padding: 0.65rem 0.85rem;
    background: var(--bg-input);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: var(--radius);
    cursor: pointer;
    text-align: left;
    color: var(--text);
    transition: border-color 0.15s, background 0.15s;
    width: 100%;
}

.multi-error-item:hover {
    border-color: var(--accent);
    background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 6%, transparent);
}

.multi-error-num {
    font-size: 0.75rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: var(--text-muted);
    min-width: 1.5rem;
    flex-shrink: 0;
}

.multi-error-body {
    flex: 1;
    min-width: 0;
    overflow: hidden;
}

.multi-error-meta {
    display: flex;
    gap: 0.4rem;
    margin-bottom: 0.25rem;
}

.multi-error-svc {
    font-size: 0.75rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: var(--accent);
    text-transform: capitalize;
}

.multi-error-type {
    font-size: 0.75rem;
    color: var(--text-muted);
}

.multi-error-excerpt {
    font-size: 0.8rem;
    color: var(--text-secondary);
    white-space: nowrap;
    overflow: hidden;
    text-overflow: ellipsis;
}

/* ─── Stack Filter (Smart) ─── */

.stack-filter {
    margin-bottom: 0.75rem;
}

.stack-filter-search {
    position: relative;
}

.stack-filter input {
    width: 100%;
}

/* ─── Stacks List ─── */

.stacks-list {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 0.5rem;
}

.stack-item {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: space-between;
    padding: 0.75rem 1rem;
    background: var(--bg-input);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: background 0.15s, border-color 0.15s;
}

.stack-item:hover {
    background: var(--bg-card-hover);
    border-color: var(--border-focus);
}

.stack-item:focus {
    background: var(--bg-card-hover);
    border-color: var(--border-focus);
    outline: 2px solid var(--border-focus);
    outline-offset: -2px;
}

.stack-item:focus:not(:focus-visible) {
    outline: none;
}

.stack-item.selected {
    background: var(--bg-selected);
    border-color: var(--border-selected);
}

.stack-info {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 0.2rem;
    min-width: 0;
    flex: 1;
}

.stack-name {
    font-weight: 600;
    font-size: 0.95rem;
    color: var(--text-primary);
    overflow: hidden;
    text-overflow: ellipsis;
    white-space: nowrap;
}

.stack-path {
    font-size: 0.8rem;
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    color: var(--text-muted);
    overflow: hidden;
    text-overflow: ellipsis;
    white-space: nowrap;
}

.stack-last-scanned {
    font-size: 0.7rem;
    color: var(--text-muted);
    opacity: 0.6;
    margin-top: 0.15rem;
}

.stack-last-scanned--stale {
    color: var(--warning);
    opacity: 0.8;
}

/* Subtle pulse on healthy dots when analysis results are stale */
.health-dot--stale {
    animation: pulse-stale 3s ease-in-out infinite;
}

@keyframes pulse-stale {
    0%, 100% { opacity: 1; }
    50% { opacity: 0.45; }
}

.stack-services {
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: 0.3rem;
    margin-top: 0.3rem;
}

.service-tag {
    display: inline-block;
    padding: 0.1rem 0.45rem;
    background: rgba(74, 144, 217, 0.1);
    border: 1px solid rgba(74, 144, 217, 0.2);
    border-radius: 3px;
    font-size: 0.75rem;
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    color: var(--accent);
}

.service-tag.highlight {
    background: rgba(63, 185, 80, 0.15);
    border-color: rgba(63, 185, 80, 0.3);
    color: var(--success);
}

.stack-meta {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: flex-end;
    gap: 0.2rem;
    flex-shrink: 0;
    margin-left: 1rem;
}

.stack-count {
    font-size: 0.8rem;
    color: var(--text-secondary);
}

.stack-source {
    font-size: 0.7rem;
    color: var(--text-muted);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 0.5px;
}

.stack-error {
    font-size: 0.8rem;
    color: var(--error);
    margin-top: 0.2rem;
}

/* ─── Health Indicators ─── */

.health-dot {
    width: 10px;
    height: 10px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    flex-shrink: 0;
    margin-right: 0.5rem;
}

.health-ok {
    background: var(--success);
    box-shadow: 0 0 4px rgba(63, 185, 80, 0.4);
}

.health-warning {
    background: var(--warning);
    box-shadow: 0 0 4px rgba(210, 153, 34, 0.4);
}

.health-problem {
    background: var(--error);
    box-shadow: 0 0 4px rgba(248, 81, 73, 0.4);
}

.health-caution {
    background: var(--warning);
    box-shadow: 0 0 4px rgba(210, 153, 34, 0.4);
    animation: blink-caution 1.4s ease-in-out infinite;
}

@keyframes blink-caution {
    0%, 100% { opacity: 1; }
    50% { opacity: 0.25; }
}

.health-unknown {
    background: #444;
}

.stack-health-hint {
    font-size: 0.75rem;
    margin-top: 0.2rem;
}

.stack-health-hint.problem {
    color: var(--error);
}

.stack-health-label {
    font-size: 0.7rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 0.5px;
}

.health-label-ok { color: var(--success); }
.health-label-warning { color: var(--warning); }
.health-label-problem { color: var(--error); }

.health-legend {
    display: flex;
    gap: 1rem;
    margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
    font-size: 0.78rem;
    color: var(--text-muted);
}

.legend-item {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 0.35rem;
}

.legend-item .health-dot {
    width: 8px;
    height: 8px;
}

.legend-item:hover {
    color: var(--text);
}

.legend-item.legend-active {
    color: var(--text);
    font-weight: 600;
}

.legend-item.legend-dimmed {
    opacity: 0.35;
}

/* Traffic light reference guide */
.traffic-light-guide {
    margin-top: 0.5rem;
    margin-bottom: 0.75rem;
    font-size: 0.8rem;
    color: var(--text-secondary);
}

.traffic-light-guide summary {
    cursor: pointer;
    color: var(--text-muted);
    font-size: 0.75rem;
    user-select: none;
}

.traffic-light-guide summary:hover {
    color: var(--text-secondary);
}

.traffic-light-guide-body {
    margin-top: 0.5rem;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 0.4rem;
    padding: 0.75rem;
    background: var(--bg-input);
    border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
}

.tl-row {
    display: flex;
    align-items: flex-start;
    gap: 0.6rem;
    line-height: 1.4;
}

.tl-row .health-dot {
    margin-top: 0.35rem;
    flex-shrink: 0;
}

/* ─── Loading & Empty ─── */

.loading {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 0.75rem;
    padding: 1rem 0;
    color: var(--text-secondary);
    font-size: 0.9rem;
}

.spinner {
    width: 18px;
    height: 18px;
    border: 2px solid var(--border);
    border-top-color: var(--accent);
    border-radius: 50%;
    animation: spin 0.8s linear infinite;
}

@keyframes spin {
    to { transform: rotate(360deg); }
}

.empty-state {
    padding: 1.5rem;
    text-align: center;
    color: var(--text-secondary);
    font-size: 0.9rem;
}

.empty-state .hint {
    margin-top: 0.75rem;
    color: var(--text-muted);
    font-size: 0.85rem;
}

.empty-state code {
    display: inline-block;
    margin-top: 0.5rem;
    padding: 0.3rem 0.6rem;
    background: var(--bg-input);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: 0.8rem;
    color: var(--accent);
    word-break: break-all;
}

.hint-examples {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 0.3rem;
    margin-top: 0.5rem;
}

.hint-label {
    font-size: 0.78rem;
    color: var(--text-muted);
    margin-top: 0.3rem;
}

.hint-muted {
    font-size: 0.72rem;
    opacity: 0.7;
}

.inline-code {
    display: inline;
    margin: 0;
    padding: 0.1rem 0.3rem;
    font-size: 0.75rem;
}

.search-note {
    margin-top: 0.75rem;
    padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem;
    font-size: 0.8rem;
    color: var(--text-muted);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    background: rgba(74, 144, 217, 0.05);
    border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
    border: 1px solid rgba(74, 144, 217, 0.1);
}

/* ─── Path Change ─── */

.path-change {
    margin-top: 0.75rem;
}

.path-input-row {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 0.5rem;
    margin-top: 0.5rem;
}

.manual-entry-row {
    display: flex;
    gap: 0.5rem;
    align-items: center;
}

.detected-dirs {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 0.35rem;
    margin-bottom: 0.25rem;
}

.detected-dirs-label {
    font-size: 0.78rem;
    color: var(--text-muted);
}

.detected-dirs-list {
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: 0.35rem;
}

.detected-dir-btn {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: 0.75rem;
}

.path-input {
    flex: 1;
    background: var(--bg-input);
    color: var(--text-primary);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
    padding: 0.45rem 0.75rem;
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: 0.82rem;
    transition: border-color 0.15s;
}

.path-input:focus {
    outline: none;
    border-color: var(--border-focus);
}

.path-input::placeholder {
    color: var(--text-muted);
}

.btn-sm {
    padding: 0.35rem 0.8rem;
    font-size: 0.8rem;
}

/* ─── Step Number Variants ─── */

.step-number.problem-icon {
    background: var(--error);
}

.step-number.info-icon {
    background: var(--accent);
    font-style: italic;
    font-family: serif;
    font-size: 1rem;
}

.step-number.gold-icon {
    background: var(--warning);
}

/* ─── Solution Tabs ─── */

.solution-tabs {
    display: flex;
    gap: 0;
    margin-bottom: -1px;
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
}

.solution-tab {
    padding: 0.45rem 1rem;
    font-size: 0.82rem;
    font-weight: 500;
    color: var(--text-muted);
    background: transparent;
    border: 1px solid transparent;
    border-bottom: none;
    border-radius: var(--radius-sm) var(--radius-sm) 0 0;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: color 0.15s, background 0.15s, border-color 0.15s;
}

.solution-tab:hover {
    color: var(--text-secondary);
}

.solution-tab.active {
    color: var(--accent);
    background: var(--bg-input);
    border-color: var(--border);
}

/* ─── RPM Wizard ─── */

.solution-tracks {
    margin: 1rem 0;
}

.track-header {
    font-size: 0.85rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: var(--text-secondary);
    margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
}

.track-options {
    display: flex;
    gap: 0.5rem;
}

.track-btn {
    flex: 1;
    padding: 0.75rem 1rem;
    background: var(--bg-input);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: var(--radius);
    cursor: pointer;
    text-align: left;
    transition: border-color 0.15s, background 0.15s;
    color: var(--text-muted);
    font-size: 0.85rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 0.25rem;
}

.track-btn:hover {
    border-color: var(--text-muted);
}

.track-btn.track-active {
    border-color: var(--accent);
    color: var(--text);
    background: var(--bg-card);
}

.track-desc {
    font-weight: 400;
    font-size: 0.78rem;
    color: var(--text-muted);
}

.rpm-wizard {
    margin-top: 1rem;
}

.wizard-gate {
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: var(--radius);
    margin-bottom: 0.75rem;
    overflow: hidden;
    transition: opacity 0.2s, border-color 0.2s;
}

.wizard-gate.locked {
    opacity: 0.4;
    pointer-events: none;
}

.wizard-gate.active {
    border-color: var(--accent);
}

.wizard-gate.complete {
    border-color: var(--green);
    opacity: 1;
}

.gate-header {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 0.5rem;
    padding: 0.6rem 0.85rem;
    background: var(--bg-input);
    font-size: 0.82rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: var(--text-secondary);
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
}

.gate-header .gate-number {
    width: 1.4rem;
    height: 1.4rem;
    border-radius: 50%;
    background: var(--border);
    color: var(--text-muted);
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    font-size: 0.72rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    flex-shrink: 0;
}

.wizard-gate.active .gate-number {
    background: var(--accent);
    color: var(--bg);
}

.wizard-gate.complete .gate-number {
    background: var(--green);
    color: var(--bg);
}

.gate-content {
    padding: 0.85rem;
}

.gate-content p {
    margin: 0 0 0.5rem;
    font-size: 0.82rem;
    line-height: 1.5;
    color: var(--text-secondary);
}

.gate-actions {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: flex-end;
    gap: 0.5rem;
    padding: 0.6rem 0.85rem;
    border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
    background: var(--bg-input);
}

.gate-actions button {
    padding: 0.4rem 1rem;
    border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
    font-size: 0.8rem;
    font-weight: 500;
    cursor: pointer;
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    background: transparent;
    color: var(--text-muted);
    transition: background 0.15s, color 0.15s;
}

.gate-actions button:hover {
    background: var(--bg-card);
    color: var(--text);
}

.gate-actions .gate-next {
    background: var(--accent);
    color: var(--bg);
    border-color: var(--accent);
}

.gate-actions .gate-next:hover {
    opacity: 0.9;
}

.gate-actions .gate-next:disabled {
    opacity: 0.4;
    cursor: not-allowed;
}

/* RPM Table */
.rpm-table {
    width: 100%;
    border-collapse: collapse;
    font-size: 0.8rem;
    margin: 0.5rem 0;
}

.rpm-table th {
    text-align: left;
    padding: 0.4rem 0.6rem;
    color: var(--text-muted);
    font-weight: 600;
    font-size: 0.75rem;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 0.03em;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
}

.rpm-table td {
    padding: 0.4rem 0.6rem;
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: 0.78rem;
    color: var(--text);
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-subtle, rgba(255,255,255,0.05));
}

.rpm-table tr:last-child td {
    border-bottom: none;
}

.rpm-arr-header {
    font-size: 0.85rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: var(--accent);
    margin: 0.75rem 0 0.25rem;
}

.rpm-arr-header:first-child {
    margin-top: 0;
}

.rpm-instructions {
    font-size: 0.78rem;
    color: var(--text-muted);
    margin: 0.5rem 0;
    padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem;
    background: var(--bg-input);
    border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
    border-left: 2px solid var(--accent);
}

.rpm-impossible {
    font-size: 0.8rem;
    color: var(--warning);
    padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem;
    background: rgba(255, 170, 0, 0.08);
    border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
    border-left: 2px solid var(--warning);
    margin: 0.5rem 0;
}

.rpm-host-note {
    font-size: 0.78rem;
    color: var(--text-muted);
    padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem;
    background: var(--bg-input);
    border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
    border-left: 2px solid var(--text-muted);
    margin: 0.5rem 0;
}

.rpm-host-note code {
    background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06);
    padding: 0.1rem 0.3rem;
    border-radius: 3px;
    font-size: 0.78rem;
}

/* Wizard inputs */
.rpm-input {
    width: 100%;
    padding: 0.4rem 0.6rem;
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: 0.8rem;
    background: var(--bg-input);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
    color: var(--text);
    margin: 0.25rem 0;
}

.rpm-input:focus {
    border-color: var(--accent);
    outline: none;
}

.rpm-checkbox-row {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 0.5rem;
    margin: 0.5rem 0;
    font-size: 0.82rem;
    color: var(--text-secondary);
    cursor: pointer;
}

.rpm-checkbox-row input[type="checkbox"] {
    accent-color: var(--accent);
    width: 1rem;
    height: 1rem;
}

/* Wizard success state */
.wizard-success {
    text-align: center;
    padding: 1.5rem;
}

.wizard-success .success-icon {
    font-size: 2.5rem;
    margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
}

.wizard-success h3 {
    color: var(--green);
    margin: 0 0 0.5rem;
    font-size: 1.1rem;
}

.wizard-success p {
    color: var(--text-secondary);
    margin: 0 0 1rem;
    font-size: 0.85rem;
}

.wizard-success .success-actions {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    gap: 0.75rem;
}

.wizard-success .success-actions button {
    padding: 0.5rem 1.2rem;
    border-radius: var(--radius);
    font-size: 0.82rem;
    cursor: pointer;
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    background: transparent;
    color: var(--text-muted);
    transition: background 0.15s;
}

.wizard-success .success-actions button:hover {
    background: var(--bg-input);
}

.wizard-success .success-actions .btn-primary {
    background: var(--accent);
    color: var(--bg);
    border-color: var(--accent);
}

/* Mount detail in wizard */
.mount-detail {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: auto 1fr;
    gap: 0.2rem 0.75rem;
    font-size: 0.8rem;
    margin: 0.5rem 0;
    padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem;
    background: var(--bg-input);
    border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
}

.mount-detail .mount-label {
    color: var(--text-muted);
    font-weight: 500;
}

.mount-detail .mount-value {
    color: var(--text);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
}

/* Add DC manually */
.add-dc-link {
    font-size: 0.78rem;
    color: var(--text-muted);
    cursor: pointer;
    margin-top: 0.5rem;
    display: inline-block;
}

.add-dc-link:hover {
    color: var(--accent);
}

.manual-dc-form {
    padding: 0.5rem;
    margin-top: 0.5rem;
    border: 1px dashed var(--border);
    border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 0.3rem;
}

.manual-dc-form label {
    font-size: 0.78rem;
    color: var(--text-muted);
}

/* ─── Code Block (Solution YAML) ─── */

.code-block {
    position: relative;
    background: var(--bg-input);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
    margin: 1rem 0;
}

.code-block pre {
    margin: 0;
    padding: 1rem;
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: 0.82rem;
    line-height: 1.5;
    color: var(--accent);
    overflow-x: auto;
    white-space: pre;
}

.code-block-small pre {
    padding: 0.6rem 1rem;
    font-size: 0.82rem;
    color: var(--text-secondary);
}

.copy-btn {
    position: absolute;
    top: 0.5rem;
    right: 0.5rem;
    background: var(--accent);
    color: var(--bg-body);
    border: none;
    padding: 0.35rem 0.75rem;
    border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
    font-size: 0.75rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: opacity 0.15s;
}

.copy-btn:hover {
    opacity: 0.85;
}

.copy-btn.copied {
    background: var(--success);
}

/* ─── Apply Fix ─── */

.solution-actions {
    position: absolute;
    top: 0.5rem;
    right: 0.5rem;
    display: flex;
    gap: 0.5rem;
}

.solution-actions .copy-btn {
    position: static;
}

.apply-btn {
    background: var(--success);
    color: var(--bg-body);
    border: none;
    padding: 0.35rem 0.75rem;
    border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
    font-size: 0.75rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    cursor: pointer;
    font-family: inherit;
}

.apply-btn:hover {
    opacity: 0.85;
}

.apply-btn.applied {
    background: var(--text-muted);
    cursor: default;
}

.apply-btn.hidden {
    display: none;
}

.apply-confirm {
    margin-top: 1rem;
    padding: 1rem;
    background: var(--bg-card);
    border: 1px solid var(--warning);
    border-radius: var(--radius);
}

.apply-confirm.hidden {
    display: none;
}

.apply-confirm-title {
    font-weight: 600;
    margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
    color: var(--warning);
}

.apply-confirm-detail {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: 0.85rem;
    color: var(--text-muted);
    margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
}

.apply-confirm-note {
    font-size: 0.8rem;
    color: var(--text-muted);
    margin-bottom: 0.75rem;
}

.apply-confirm-buttons {
    display: flex;
    gap: 0.75rem;
}

.apply-confirm-yes {
    background: var(--success);
    color: var(--bg-body);
    border: none;
    padding: 0.5rem 1.25rem;
    border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
    font-weight: 600;
    cursor: pointer;
    font-family: inherit;
}

.apply-confirm-yes:hover {
    opacity: 0.85;
}

.apply-confirm-no {
    background: transparent;
    color: var(--text-muted);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    padding: 0.5rem 1.25rem;
    border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
    cursor: pointer;
    font-family: inherit;
}

.apply-confirm-no:hover {
    color: var(--text-primary);
    border-color: var(--text-muted);
}

.apply-result {
    margin-top: 0.75rem;
    padding: 0.75rem 1rem;
    border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
    font-size: 0.85rem;
}

.apply-result.hidden {
    display: none;
}

.apply-result-success {
    background: rgba(34, 197, 94, 0.1);
    border: 1px solid var(--success);
    color: var(--success);
}

.apply-result-error {
    background: rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.1);
    border: 1px solid var(--error);
    color: var(--error);
}

/* ─── Visual Diff Highlights ─── */

.yaml-line {
    display: block;
    padding: 0 0.5rem;
    white-space: pre;
    line-height: 1.5;
    min-height: 1.5em;
}

.yaml-line.diff-changed {
    border-left: 3px solid var(--success);
    background: rgba(63, 185, 80, 0.08);
    padding-left: calc(0.5rem - 3px);
    border-radius: 0 2px 2px 0;
}

/* ─── Analysis: Service Volume Table ─── */

.service-volume-table {
    width: 100%;
    border-collapse: collapse;
    margin: 0.75rem 0;
    font-size: 0.85rem;
}

.service-volume-table th {
    text-align: left;
    padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem;
    font-size: 0.75rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: var(--text-muted);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 0.5px;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
}

.service-volume-table td {
    padding: 0.4rem 0.75rem;
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(42, 46, 58, 0.5);
    color: var(--text-secondary);
}

.service-volume-table .svc-name {
    font-weight: 600;
    color: var(--text-primary);
    white-space: nowrap;
}

.service-volume-table .svc-name .service-icon {
    vertical-align: middle;
    margin-right: 0.3rem;
}

.service-volume-table .svc-role {
    font-size: 0.75rem;
    color: var(--text-muted);
}

.service-volume-table .vol-path {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: 0.82rem;
}

/* ─── Analysis: Conflict Cards ─── */

.conflict-item {
    padding: 0.75rem 1rem;
    margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
    border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
    border-left: 3px solid;
}

.conflict-critical {
    border-left-color: var(--error);
    background: rgba(248, 81, 73, 0.06);
}

.conflict-high {
    border-left-color: var(--warning);
    background: rgba(210, 153, 34, 0.06);
}

.conflict-medium {
    border-left-color: var(--accent);
    background: rgba(74, 144, 217, 0.06);
}

.conflict-description {
    font-size: 0.88rem;
    color: var(--text-primary);
    margin-bottom: 0.3rem;
}

.conflict-detail {
    font-size: 0.82rem;
    color: var(--text-muted);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    white-space: pre-wrap;
}

.conflict-severity {
    display: inline-block;
    padding: 0.1rem 0.5rem;
    border-radius: 10px;
    font-size: 0.7rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 0.5px;
    margin-bottom: 0.4rem;
}

.severity-critical {
    background: rgba(248, 81, 73, 0.15);
    color: var(--error);
}

.severity-high {
    background: rgba(210, 153, 34, 0.15);
    color: var(--warning);
}

/* ─── Checklist ─── */

.checklist {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 0.6rem;
}

.checklist-item {
    display: flex;
    align-items: flex-start;
    gap: 0.6rem;
}

.checklist-item input[type="checkbox"] {
    width: 18px;
    height: 18px;
    margin-top: 2px;
    cursor: pointer;
    accent-color: var(--success);
    flex-shrink: 0;
}

.checklist-item label {
    font-size: 0.88rem;
    color: var(--text-secondary);
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: opacity 0.2s, text-decoration 0.2s;
}

.checklist-item.checked label {
    text-decoration: line-through;
    opacity: 0.5;
}

.checklist-item code {
    padding: 0.1rem 0.35rem;
    background: var(--bg-input);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: 3px;
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: 0.82rem;
    color: var(--accent);
}

/* ─── Callouts ─── */

.callout {
    padding: 0.75rem 1rem;
    border-left: 3px solid var(--accent);
    background: rgba(74, 144, 217, 0.06);
    border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
    margin: 0.75rem 0;
    font-size: 0.88rem;
    color: var(--text-secondary);
}

.callout.callout-success {
    border-left-color: var(--success);
    background: rgba(63, 185, 80, 0.06);
}

.callout.callout-warning {
    border-left-color: var(--warning);
    background: rgba(210, 153, 34, 0.06);
}

.callout.callout-category {
    border-left-color: var(--warning);
    background: rgba(210, 153, 34, 0.12);
    border-left-width: 4px;
    padding: 1rem 1.25rem;
    color: var(--text-primary);
}

.category-intro {
    font-size: 0.9rem;
    color: var(--text-secondary);
    margin-bottom: 0.75rem;
    line-height: 1.5;
}

.callout a {
    color: var(--accent);
    text-decoration: none;
}

.callout a:hover {
    text-decoration: underline;
}

/* ─── Why This Works: Collapsible ─── */

.why-card-content {
    max-height: 0;
    overflow: hidden;
    transition: max-height 0.4s ease;
}

.why-card-content.expanded {
    max-height: 500px;
}

.why-toggle {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 0.35rem;
    padding: 0.35rem 0.8rem;
    background: rgba(74, 144, 217, 0.08);
    color: var(--text-secondary);
    border: 1px solid rgba(74, 144, 217, 0.15);
    border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
    font-size: 0.82rem;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: background 0.15s, color 0.15s;
}

.why-toggle:hover {
    background: rgba(74, 144, 217, 0.14);
    color: var(--text-primary);
}

.why-toggle-arrow {
    font-size: 0.7em;
    transition: transform 0.3s;
}

.why-toggle.expanded .why-toggle-arrow {
    transform: rotate(90deg);
}

/* ─── TRaSH Advisory ─── */

.trash-structure {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: 0.82rem;
    color: var(--text-secondary);
    line-height: 1.5;
    padding: 0.75rem 1rem;
    background: var(--bg-input);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
    margin: 0.75rem 0;
    white-space: pre;
}

/* ─── Healthy State ─── */

.healthy-message {
    font-size: 0.9rem;
    color: var(--success);
    margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
}

.healthy-detail {
    font-size: 0.88rem;
    color: var(--text-secondary);
}

/* ─── Compact Healthy: Collapsible Setup Table ─── */

.healthy-setup-content {
    max-height: 0;
    overflow: hidden;
    transition: max-height 0.4s ease;
}

.healthy-setup-content.expanded {
    max-height: 600px;
}

.healthy-inline-actions {
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: 0.5rem;
    margin-top: 1rem;
}

.healthy-trash-badge {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 0.35rem;
    padding: 0.3rem 0.75rem;
    border-radius: 14px;
    font-size: 0.78rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    margin-top: 0.75rem;
}

.healthy-trash-badge.compliant {
    background: rgba(63, 185, 80, 0.1);
    color: var(--success);
    border: 1px solid rgba(63, 185, 80, 0.25);
}

.healthy-trash-badge.close {
    background: rgba(210, 153, 34, 0.1);
    color: var(--warning);
    border: 1px solid rgba(210, 153, 34, 0.25);
}

.healthy-trash-badge.non-compliant {
    background: rgba(92, 99, 112, 0.1);
    color: var(--text-muted);
    border: 1px solid rgba(92, 99, 112, 0.2);
}

/* ─── Footer ─── */

.footer {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    gap: 1.25rem;
    padding: 1rem 2rem;
    border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
    font-size: 0.8rem;
    color: var(--text-muted);
}

.footer-version {
    font-weight: 600;
    color: var(--text-muted);
    transition: color 0.3s;
    position: relative;
}

.footer-version.update-available {
    color: var(--warning);
    cursor: pointer;
}

.footer-version[data-tooltip]::after {
    content: attr(data-tooltip);
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 100%;
    left: 50%;
    transform: translateX(-50%);
    padding: 0.25rem 0.5rem;
    background: var(--bg-card);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
    font-size: 0.7rem;
    white-space: nowrap;
    color: var(--text-primary);
    opacity: 0;
    pointer-events: none;
    transition: opacity 0.15s;
    margin-bottom: 4px;
}

.footer-version[data-tooltip]:hover::after {
    opacity: 1;
}

.footer-links {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 0.75rem;
}

.footer-icon {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    width: 28px;
    height: 28px;
    color: var(--text-muted);
    border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
    transition: color 0.15s, background 0.15s;
    position: relative;
}

.footer-icon:hover {
    color: var(--accent);
    background: rgba(74, 144, 217, 0.08);
}

.footer-icon svg {
    width: 16px;
    height: 16px;
    fill: currentColor;
}

.footer-icon[data-tooltip]::after {
    content: attr(data-tooltip);
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 100%;
    left: 50%;
    transform: translateX(-50%);
    padding: 0.25rem 0.5rem;
    background: var(--bg-card);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
    font-size: 0.7rem;
    white-space: nowrap;
    color: var(--text-primary);
    opacity: 0;
    pointer-events: none;
    transition: opacity 0.15s;
    margin-bottom: 4px;
}

.footer-icon[data-tooltip]:hover::after {
    opacity: 1;
}

.separator {
    color: var(--border);
}

/* ─── GitHub Stars Badge ─── */

.github-stars {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 0.3rem;
    padding: 0.1rem 0.5rem;
    border-radius: 10px;
    font-size: 0.7rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    background: rgba(210, 153, 34, 0.1);
    color: var(--warning);
    border: 1px solid rgba(210, 153, 34, 0.2);
    text-decoration: none;
    transition: background 0.15s, border-color 0.15s;
    line-height: 1;
    vertical-align: middle;
}

.github-stars:hover {
    background: rgba(210, 153, 34, 0.18);
    border-color: rgba(210, 153, 34, 0.35);
}

.github-stars-icon {
    font-size: 0.75rem;
    line-height: 1;
}

/* ─── Analysis Terminal ─── */

.terminal {
    border-radius: var(--radius);
    overflow: hidden;
    border: 1px solid #333;
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: 0.82rem;
}

.terminal-header {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 6px;
    padding: 8px 12px;
    background: #2a2a2a;
}

.terminal-dot {
    width: 10px;
    height: 10px;
    border-radius: 50%;
}

.terminal-dot { background: #444; transition: background 0.3s; }
.terminal-dot.active-red { background: #ff5f57; }
.terminal-dot.active-yellow { background: #febc2e; }
.terminal-dot.active-green { background: #28c840; }

.terminal-title {
    margin-left: 8px;
    font-size: 0.75rem;
    color: #888;
}

.terminal-body {
    background: #0c0c0c;
    padding: 12px 16px;
    min-height: 60px;
    max-height: 300px;
    overflow-y: auto;
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: 0.78rem;
    letter-spacing: 0.01em;
}

.terminal-line {
    display: flex;
    align-items: flex-start;
    gap: 8px;
    line-height: 1.6;
    color: #b0b0b0;
    opacity: 0;
    animation: terminalReveal 0.15s ease-out forwards;
}

@keyframes terminalReveal {
    from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(4px); }
    to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
}

.terminal-icon {
    flex-shrink: 0;
    display: inline-block;
    width: 16px;
    text-align: center;
    margin-top: 2px;
}

.terminal-icon.ok::before { content: "\2713"; color: #28c840; }
.terminal-icon.run::before { content: "\2192"; color: #4a90d9; }
.terminal-icon.info::before { content: "\2022"; color: #888; }
.terminal-icon.warn::before { content: "!"; color: #febc2e; font-weight: 700; }
.terminal-icon.fail::before { content: "\2717"; color: #ff5f57; }
.terminal-icon.done::before { content: "\2713"; color: #28c840; font-weight: 700; }

.terminal-line.done-line {
    color: #28c840;
    font-weight: 600;
    margin-top: 4px;
}

/* Overridden terminal lines — dimmed when the warning was misleading */
.terminal-line.terminal-line-overridden {
    opacity: 0.35;
    text-decoration: line-through;
}
.terminal-icon.overridden::before {
    content: "\2014"; /* em dash */
    color: #666;
    font-weight: 400;
}

/* ─── Stack Group Boxes ─── */
/* Each role group is a compact bordered box with a scrollable interior.
   Shows ~4 stacks at a time. Keeps the page tight when there are 35+ stacks. */

.stack-group {
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
    margin-top: 0.75rem;
    overflow: hidden;
}

.stack-group:first-child {
    margin-top: 0;
}

.stack-group-header {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 0.5rem;
    padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem;
    font-size: 0.75rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: var(--text-muted);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 0.5px;
    background: var(--bg-input);
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
    position: sticky;
    top: 0;
    z-index: 2;
}

.stack-group-items {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 1px;
    max-height: 280px;
    overflow-y: auto;
    scrollbar-width: thin;
    scrollbar-color: var(--border) transparent;
}

.stack-group-items::-webkit-scrollbar {
    width: 6px;
}

.stack-group-items::-webkit-scrollbar-track {
    background: transparent;
}

.stack-group-items::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
    background: var(--border);
    border-radius: 3px;
}

/* Stack items inside groups lose their own border/radius — the group box provides it */
.stack-group .stack-item {
    border: none;
    border-radius: 0;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
}

.stack-group .stack-item:last-child {
    border-bottom: none;
}

/* Subtle role accent on the group left edge */
.stack-group-arr {
    border-left: 3px solid var(--accent);
}
